name: The Most Upsetting Guessing Game in the World
original_name: The Most Upsetting Guessing Game in the World
overview: The 'Most Upsetting Guessing Game' is a comedy/improv guessing game based on 'Party Quirks' from the Aunty Donna Podcast. Each week a 'party host' is selected and tasked with guessing what 'characters' are attending their party. Sounds simple enough? It's not... it's cooked.

trailers.title: The Most Upsetting Guessing Game in the World
